title: Callista moulmeinensis
taxonomy: Callista moulmeinensis is a species of sea snail in the family Veneridae. It is a type of clams, which are marine bivalve mollusks. The classification of Callista moulmeinensis includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, class Bivalvia, order Veneroida, and family Veneridae. This species is further classified into the genus Callista. The taxonomy of Callista moulmeinensis is a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to changes as new information becomes available.
